patches.hypothesis: The method fails to parse time zone identifiers correctly if a shorter identifier is present and precedes a longer matching one. We need to ensure it selects the longest matching identifier.

The method incorrectly matches partial zone IDs such as 'Dawson' instead of the full 'America/Dawson_Creek'. This can be fixed by ensuring that matches are only accepted if they correspond to full time zone IDs.
patches.changes: Changed str.startsWith(id) to str.equals(id) to ensure full match.
patches.diff: Changed str.startsWith(id) to str.equals(id) to ensure full match.
